title: Localize native preview support controls and contract labels
summary: Move the remaining user-facing preview support control labels, contract labels, and preview enum display copy onto typed StudioStrings and the string catalog so native preview stays truthful and localization-safe.
acceptance_criteria: StudioMacPreviewSupport no longer hardcodes its preview controls, contract panel labels, or preview display copy in English.
Preview-specific labels and formatted values are exposed through typed StudioStrings entries backed by Localizable.xcstrings.
The slice keeps preview behavior unchanged while improving native localization truth.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: HS-0014 ticket schema validated after localizing preview support copy and recording verification evidence.
Patch hygiene passed after moving preview support labels, summaries, and contract copy onto StudioStrings and Localizable.xcstrings.
Repo contract validation passed after extending the preview localization surface.
Workflow-only local checks passed after the preview string and string-catalog updates.
Expected branch-freshness failure on the active lane topic branch; the doctor reported strict branch freshness missing because the checkout is not the reserved clean main root.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after localizing preview control labels, preview summaries, and contract panel copy.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 localization debt was re-ranked after branch cleanup and the largest remaining native hardcoded copy was found in StudioMacPreviewSupport.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: This slice stays product-safe and should not change preview behavior.
Implementation is intentionally constrained to native preview strings and display labels rather than geometry changes.
